'''R4-P22''' was the designation of the [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] attached to [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker's]] modified [[Delta-7 Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|Delta-7 ''Aethersprite''-class starfighter]], ''[[Azure Angel]]'', during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==Biography==
Although part of the [[R4 astromech droid/Legends|R4-series]] of astromech droids, R4-P22—and all other [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] astromechs—were based on [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi's]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]], [[R4-P17/Legends|R4-P17]], which had an [[R2-series astromech droid/Legends|R2]]-style dome rather than the usual conical head dome.

R4-P22 flew with Anakin Skywalker during the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]], but was destroyed on the surface of [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] when [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] destroyed his ship.

Skywalker's wife, [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], later presented him with her Royal House of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] droid [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], which flew with Anakin for the rest of the war.
